name: U.S. Virgin Islands DLCA Construction Contractors and Trades License Search

agency.name: U.S. Virgin Islands Department of Licensing and Consumer Affairs

termsReviewNotes: No dedicated DLCA access, reuse, or website terms page was found in the official agency site or license-search navigation during the 2026-06-27 review. Keep redistribution and automation status unknown and do not infer permission from public accessibility.
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the DLCA license search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: construction contractors and trades records exposed by the official DLCA license search
knownExclusions: License-search fields, board certification categories, inactive coverage, and historical records require follow-up review before adapter work.
Business-license applications, board certifications, complaint records, and enforcement records may need separate official source entries.
No redistribution permission for generated datasets has been confirmed.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access should confirm stable query behavior and avoid bypassing technical controls.
publicRecordsNotes: Official DLCA license-search metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, business authorization, permit, or board certification does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for U.S. Virgin Islands DLCA construction contractors and trades license search. Future work should research license-type filters and fixture-safe search results.
maintainerNotes: Keep DLCA board-certification and business-license paths distinct unless future source research proves a shared data model.
